name: Relay Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Relay Therapeutics is a clinical-stage small molecule precision medicine company developing therapies for patients with cancer and genetic disease. Its lead product candidate is zovegalisib, an allosteric, pan-mutant and isoform-selective PI3Kα inhibitor in clinical development for HR+/HER2- breast cancer. The company also advances early-stage programs in precision oncology and genetic diseases.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage, small molecule precision medicine company developing potentially life-changing therapies for patients living with cancer and genetic disease.

catalysts.event: Initiation of global Phase 3 registrational study (ReDiscover-2 Trial) for zovegalisib plus fulvestrant in PI3Kα-mutated HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer
catalysts.sentence: In the second quarter of 2025, we initiated a global Phase 3 registrational study, or the ReDiscover-2 Trial, which is designed to evaluate the safety and efficacy of zovegalisib plus fulvestrant in PI3Kα-mutated, HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer patients previously treated with a CDK4/6 inhibitor.

catalysts.event: FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to zovegalisib in combination with fulvestrant for PIK3CA mutant HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced that the FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to zovegalisib in combination with fulvestrant for the treatment of adults with PIK3CA mutant HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer following recurrence or progression on or after treatment with a CDK4/6 inhibitor.
